description: A corporate network policy requires all server applications to route outbound traffic through an approved proxy server. Configure the proxy server settings in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus so that all outbound connections (update checks, license validation, etc.) use the corporate proxy. Enable the proxy server using host proxy.corpnet-finance.com on port 8080 with authentication enabled for username svc_adaudit and password Pr0xy@Acc3ss!2024. Ensure the settings are saved and persisted.
